title: Build AI-Enabled Applications with Java and Spring Boot
subtitle: Semantic search, evidence-grounded RAG, governed actions, chat memory, and tenant security with AI Fabric

certificate.title: AI Fabric Course Certificate of Completion
certificate.reason: Certificate applications open after the complete required course and capstone are published.

tracks.title: Quickstart
tracks.description: Reach one useful semantic-search result before the Core track explains the complete architecture.

lessons.title: First Useful Result
lessons.description: Index support knowledge and retrieve it by meaning without cloud credentials.

tracks.title: Core Course
tracks.description: Build one support assistant through retrieval, RAG, governed actions, memory, security, and testing.

lessons.title: What Is AI Fabric? Architecture And Mental Model
lessons.description: Learn why AI Fabric exists, when to use it, how its modules fit together, and what remains application-owned.

lessons.title: Model And Index Application Data
lessons.description: Define content and metadata, then prove the complete vector lifecycle.

lessons.title: Evidence-Grounded RAG
lessons.description: Retrieve approved evidence before generation and expose its source IDs.

lessons.title: Governed Actions And Confirmation
lessons.description: Register typed actions, collect parameters, and confirm writes before execution.

lessons.title: Backend-Owned Conversation Memory
lessons.description: Resolve follow-ups and pending confirmations from framework session state.

lessons.title: Tenant Security And Privacy
lessons.description: Apply identity, tenant, access, and PII policy before evidence or execution.

lessons.title: Test And Ship The Vertical Slice
lessons.description: Separate deterministic, packaged-runtime, and live-provider release evidence.

tracks.title: Production Track
tracks.description: Operate providers, indexing, RAG quality, managed vectors, and release workflows.

lessons.title: OpenAI And Local ONNX Provider Profiles
lessons.description: Make local and live provider posture explicit without hidden fallback.

lessons.title: Indexing, Backfill, And Vector Lifecycle
lessons.description: Keep source data, embeddings, and vector storage synchronized through change.

lessons.title: RAG Quality And Prompt Regression
lessons.description: Test expected evidence, no-source behavior, and application prompt overlays.

lessons.title: Move From Lucene To A Managed Vector Provider
lessons.description: Preserve the retrieval contract while making Qdrant operations and failures visible.

lessons.title: Operations And Release Readiness
lessons.description: Package, identify, isolate, clean, and verify the deployed application.

tracks.title: Real-App Case Studies
tracks.description: Inspect five deployed applications and the failures that improved their architecture.

lessons.title: AI Shopping Experience
lessons.description: Staged commerce RAG, attachments, governed cart actions, and result projection.

lessons.title: AI Fabric Account Resolver
lessons.description: Profile reads, policy-grounded blockers, follow-ups, and governed remedies.

lessons.title: AI Fabric Behavior Signals
lessons.description: Incremental insight generation and allowlisted agentic UI composition.

lessons.title: AI Fabric Tenant Guard
lessons.description: Tenant-scoped evidence, role policy, denied retrieval, and governed writes.

lessons.title: AI Fabric Privacy Shield
lessons.description: Backend PII processing, sanitized indexing, and privacy proof without false AI claims.

tracks.title: Coding-Assistant Track
tracks.description: Give an assistant correct evidence, bound its work, and independently review the result.

lessons.title: Give An Assistant Correct Context
lessons.description: Assemble release-pinned context and require an ownership map before code.

lessons.title: Implement A Small Capability Safely
lessons.description: Use bounded prompts, current APIs, tests, and a fresh findings-first review.
